label: HIPAA
description: Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act — US law governing the protection of protected health information (PHI) across healthcare entities and their business associates.

§164.308.label: Administrative Safeguards
§164.308.description: Security management, access management, training, and contingency planning

§164.310.label: Physical Safeguards
§164.310.description: Facility access controls, workstation use, and device/media controls

§164.312.label: Technical Safeguards
§164.312.description: Access control, audit controls, integrity, transmission security

§164.314.label: Organizational Requirements
§164.314.description: Business associate contracts and group health plan requirements
